Appointment Scheduling.title: New Consultation Booking
Appointment Scheduling.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, this is {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}} from {{BUSINESS_NAME}}. I have openings on [DATE] at [TIME] and [DATE] at [TIME] for your consultation. Let me know which suits you and I'll lock it in. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Appointment Scheduling.title: Confirming a Phone Consultation
Appointment Scheduling.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, confirming your phone consultation with {{BUSINESS_NAME}} on [DATE] at [TIME]. I'll call you on the number you provided. Please have any relevant documents ready so we can make the most of our time. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Appointment Scheduling.title: Same-Day Appointment Reminder
Appointment Scheduling.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, just a reminder your appointment with {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}} at {{BUSINESS_NAME}} is today at [TIME]. If you need to reach me before then, call or text {{BUSINESS_PHONE}}. See you shortly.

Appointment Scheduling.title: Client Requesting Unavailable Time
Appointment Scheduling.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, that time slot isn't available. My next openings at {{BUSINESS_NAME}} are [DATE] at [TIME] or [DATE] at [TIME]. Let me know which works for you and I'll confirm it straight away. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Appointment Scheduling.title: On-Site Visit Confirmation
Appointment Scheduling.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, confirming my on-site visit to your property on [DATE] at [TIME]. Please ensure access to [AREA/ROOM] is available when I arrive. If anything changes, contact me at {{BUSINESS_PHONE}} with at least 24 hours notice. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Appointment Scheduling.title: Follow-Up After Missed Appointment
Appointment Scheduling.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I noticed we missed our scheduled appointment today. I hope everything is alright. If you'd like to rebook, my next available time is [DATE] at [TIME]. Please note our cancellation policy requires 24 hours notice. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Appointment Scheduling.title: Recurring Appointment Setup
Appointment Scheduling.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, based on our discussion, I'd like to set up a recurring [WEEKLY/FORTNIGHTLY/MONTHLY] appointment on [DAY] at [TIME]. I'll send a reminder before each session. Let me know if this schedule works for you. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Appointment Scheduling.title: Virtual Meeting Link Sent
Appointment Scheduling.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, here's the link for our virtual meeting on [DATE] at [TIME]: [MEETING LINK]. Please test the link beforehand to avoid any delays. If you have trouble connecting, call me at {{BUSINESS_PHONE}} and we'll sort it out. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Payment Reminders.title: Invoice Sent Notification
Payment Reminders.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've just sent invoice [#INVOICE] for [AMOUNT] to your email. Payment is due by [DUE DATE]. If you have any questions about the breakdown, let me know. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Payment Reminders.title: Upcoming Payment Reminder - 3 Days
Payment Reminders.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, this is a reminder that your payment of [AMOUNT] for invoice [#INVOICE] is due in 3 days on [DUE DATE]. You can pay via the link in the invoice or by direct transfer. Let me know if you need the details resent. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Payment Reminders.title: Payment Overdue - 14 Days
Payment Reminders.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, invoice [#INVOICE] for [AMOUNT] is now 14 days overdue. I'd appreciate it if you could arrange payment at your earliest convenience. If there's a reason for the delay, please let me know so we can work something out. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Payment Reminders.title: Partial Payment Received
Payment Reminders.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've received a partial payment of [AMOUNT RECEIVED] toward invoice [#INVOICE]. The remaining balance is [REMAINING AMOUNT]. Please arrange payment of the balance by [DATE]. Let me know if you'd like to discuss a payment plan. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Payment Reminders.title: Retainer Renewal Invoice
Payment Reminders.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, your retainer with {{BUSINESS_NAME}} renews on [DATE]. I've sent the renewal invoice for [AMOUNT]. Please process payment before the renewal date so there's no interruption to your service. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Payment Reminders.title: Payment Method Failed
Payment Reminders.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I attempted to process your payment of [AMOUNT] but it was declined. Could you please update your payment method or arrange an alternative? Let me know if you need me to resend the invoice with different payment options. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Payment Reminders.title: Late Fee Notice
Payment Reminders.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, as per our agreement, a late fee of [FEE AMOUNT] has been applied to invoice [#INVOICE], which is now [DAYS] days overdue. The updated total is [NEW TOTAL]. Please arrange payment as soon as possible. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Payment Reminders.title: Final Payment Before File Handover
Payment Reminders.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, your project files are ready for handover. As per our agreement, the final payment of [AMOUNT] needs to be received before I can release them. Once payment clears, I'll send everything through immediately. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Follow-Up.title: First Check-In After Proposal
Follow-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, just circling back on the proposal I sent on [DATE]. I wanted to make sure you had a chance to review it. If you have any questions or want to discuss adjustments, I'm available this week. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Follow-Up.title: Follow-Up on Unanswered Design Concepts
Follow-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I sent through the initial concepts on [DATE] and haven't heard back yet. I'd love your feedback so I can refine the direction. Even a quick note on what you like or don't like would be helpful. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Follow-Up.title: Follow-Up After Site Inspection
Follow-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, following up after the site inspection on [DATE]. I sent the report and recommendations to your email. Let me know when you've had a chance to review so we can discuss next steps. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Follow-Up.title: Checking In After Free Consultation
Follow-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, it was great chatting with you during our consultation. I wanted to follow up and see if you had any further questions or if you'd like to move forward. I'm happy to put together a formal proposal whenever you're ready. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Follow-Up.title: Follow-Up - Contract Not Yet Returned
Follow-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I sent the contract on [DATE] and haven't received it back yet. I'm holding your spot in my schedule, but I can only do so until [DATE]. If you'd like to proceed, please sign and return it at your earliest convenience. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Follow-Up.title: Closing File After Extended Silence
Follow-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've followed up a few times now regarding [TOPIC] and understand things may have shifted on your end. I'll close out your file for now, but if you'd like to revisit in the future, you're welcome to reach out at {{BUSINESS_EMAIL}}. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Clarification.title: Defining Project Boundaries Up Front
Scope Clarification.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, before we begin, I want to make sure we're aligned on what this project includes. The scope covers [INCLUSIONS]. Anything beyond that can be handled as a separate engagement. Let me know if you'd like to adjust anything before I start. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Clarification.title: Redirecting an Off-Scope Request
Scope Clarification.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, that's a great idea, but it falls outside the current project scope. I can add it as a separate line item with its own quote and timeline. Would you like me to price that up for you? - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Clarification.title: Explaining What Revisions Cover
Scope Clarification.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, just to clarify, your package includes [NUMBER] rounds of revisions. Each round covers adjustments to [SPECIFIC ELEMENTS]. Changes to the overall concept or structure after approval would be treated as new work. Happy to explain further if needed. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Clarification.title: Clarifying Maintenance vs. New Work
Scope Clarification.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, the request you've described is new work rather than maintenance. Maintenance covers [MAINTENANCE ITEMS]. New feature development or design changes are quoted separately. I can send through a quote for this if you'd like to proceed. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Clarification.title: Setting Expectations on Response Times
Scope Clarification.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I want to clarify how communication works during your project. I respond to messages within [TIMEFRAME] during business hours ([HOURS]). Urgent matters should be flagged in the subject line. Calls outside these hours are not included in the project scope. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Clarification.title: Confirming Change Order Details
Scope Clarification.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've noted the changes you'd like. Here's the updated scope: [UPDATED SCOPE]. The additional cost is [AMOUNT] and the new timeline is [TIMEFRAME]. Please confirm in writing and I'll proceed. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Declining Requests.title: Declining a Project Outside Your Specialty
Declining Requests.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, thanks for considering {{BUSINESS_NAME}} for this. That type of work is outside my area of expertise and I wouldn't want to deliver anything less than professional quality. I'd recommend looking for a specialist in [AREA]. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Declining Requests.title: Declining Work Due to Conflict of Interest
Declining Requests.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I appreciate the opportunity, but I have an existing commitment that would create a conflict of interest with this project. I wouldn't be able to serve you with full integrity. I'd be happy to refer you to a trusted colleague. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Declining Requests.title: Declining Spec Work
Declining Requests.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I appreciate your interest. {{BUSINESS_NAME}} doesn't do spec work or unpaid trials. I'm confident in the quality I deliver, and my portfolio reflects that. If you'd like to move forward with a paid engagement, I'm happy to discuss next steps. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Declining Requests.title: Declining Scope Expansion Without Budget
Declining Requests.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand you'd like to add [ITEM] to the project. I'm not able to include additional work without adjusting the budget. I can send a revised quote that includes this, or we can keep the original scope as-is. Let me know your preference. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Declining Requests.title: Declining an Unrealistic Deadline
Declining Requests.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've reviewed the timeline and I'm not able to deliver quality work in that timeframe. The earliest I can complete this properly is [REALISTIC DATE]. I'd rather be upfront now than deliver something below standard. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Declining Requests.title: Declining a Personal Favor Request
Declining Requests.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I appreciate you thinking of me. I keep things professional at {{BUSINESS_NAME}} and handle all work through my standard process and pricing. If you'd like to engage me for this, I'm happy to send through a quote. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Delivery Updates.title: Work Has Officially Begun
Delivery Updates.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've officially started work on your project today. You can expect the first draft or update by [DATE]. I'll keep you posted along the way. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Delivery Updates.title: Phase One Complete
Delivery Updates.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, phase one of your project is complete. I've delivered [DELIVERABLE] to your email. Please review and provide feedback by [DATE] so I can move into phase two on schedule. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Delivery Updates.title: Delay Due to Third-Party Dependency
Delivery Updates.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I wanted to let you know there's a delay on your project due to [THIRD PARTY] not delivering their part on time. The revised delivery date is [NEW DATE]. I'm doing everything I can to keep things moving on my end. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Delivery Updates.title: Sending a Progress Preview
Delivery Updates.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I wanted to share a quick preview of where your project is at. I've attached [PREVIEW ITEM]. This is still a work in progress, so please don't share it externally yet. Final delivery is still on track for [DATE]. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Delivery Updates.title: Final Delivery Incoming
Delivery Updates.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, your final [DELIVERABLE] will be delivered tomorrow by [TIME]. Please keep an eye on your email. Once you've received everything, let me know if there's anything you need adjusted within your included revisions. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Delivery Updates.title: Timeline Adjusted After Client Delay
Delivery Updates.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, since I received [ITEM] on [DATE] instead of the originally agreed [ORIGINAL DATE], the project timeline has shifted. The new estimated completion date is [NEW DATE]. I'll do my best to stay ahead of schedule where I can. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Wrap-Up.title: All Files Delivered
Wrap-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, all final files for your project have been delivered to your email. Please download and save them to your own storage. I'll retain copies on my end for [TIMEFRAME] and then they'll be archived. Let me know if anything is missing. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Wrap-Up.title: Requesting a Google Review
Wrap-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, thanks for a great project. If you have a moment, a Google review would be a huge help for {{BUSINESS_NAME}}. Here's the link: [REVIEW LINK]. A couple of sentences about your experience is all it takes. I appreciate your support. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Wrap-Up.title: Post-Project Check-In (30 Days)
Wrap-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, it's been about a month since we wrapped up your project. I wanted to check in and see how everything is going. If you've noticed anything that needs attention, let me know. Otherwise, I'm glad it's working well for you. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Wrap-Up.title: Handing Over Credentials / Access
Wrap-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, as part of project wrap-up, I've transferred all account credentials and access to your email. Please update the passwords immediately for security. If you need help with the transition, I'm here for the next [TIMEFRAME]. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Wrap-Up.title: Offering Ongoing Maintenance
Wrap-Up.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, now that your project is complete, I offer ongoing maintenance packages starting at [AMOUNT]/month. This covers [INCLUSIONS]. No obligation, but it's there if you need it. Let me know if you'd like more details. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Onboarding.title: Welcome and Next Steps
Onboarding.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, welcome aboard. I'm {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}} and I'll be handling your project at {{BUSINESS_NAME}}. Here's what happens next: I'll send a brief questionnaire, then a formal agreement, and once the deposit is received, we'll lock in your start date. Any questions, reach out at {{BUSINESS_EMAIL}}.

Onboarding.title: Requesting Brand Assets
Onboarding.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, to get started on your project, I'll need the following from you: [LIST OF ASSETS]. Please send them to {{BUSINESS_EMAIL}} by [DATE]. If you don't have some of these, let me know and we'll work out alternatives. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Onboarding.title: Project Timeline Shared
Onboarding.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've put together your project timeline. Key milestones: [MILESTONE 1] by [DATE], [MILESTONE 2] by [DATE], final delivery by [DATE]. This timeline depends on receiving your materials and feedback on schedule. Please review and confirm. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Onboarding.title: Introducing Your Process
Onboarding.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, here's a quick overview of how I work at {{BUSINESS_NAME}}. I start with a discovery phase, then move into [PHASE 2], followed by [PHASE 3], and wrap up with final delivery and revisions. Updates are sent at each phase. You'll always know where things stand. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Onboarding.title: Deposit Received - Project Scheduled
Onboarding.body: Hi {{CLIENT_NAME}}, your deposit has been received. Your project is now scheduled to begin on [START DATE]. I'll be in touch before then with any final prep items. Thanks for choosing {{BUSINESS_NAME}} - I'm looking forward to getting started. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Scope Creep.title: Additional Pages Requested Mid-Project (Web Dev)
Scope Creep.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, the additional pages you've requested are outside the agreed scope. Your project covers [ORIGINAL PAGE COUNT] pages. I can add the new pages at [RATE] per page with a revised timeline. Let me know if you'd like a quote for the additions, or if you'd prefer to proceed with the original scope. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Creep.title: Client Requesting Extra Edits After Final Delivery (Photographer)
Scope Creep.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, your package included [NUMBER] edited images, and those have all been delivered and approved. Additional edits are available at [RATE] per image. I'm happy to continue if you'd like, but I need your confirmation before I begin additional work. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Creep.title: Expanding the Brief After Agreement (Graphic Designer)
Scope Creep.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, the new items you've mentioned weren't part of our original brief. Our agreement covers [ORIGINAL DELIVERABLES]. Adding [NEW ITEMS] would require a scope extension. I'll send a revised quote today so you can decide how you'd like to proceed. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Creep.title: Client Adding Rooms to a Renovation Quote (Contractor)
Scope Creep.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, the original quote covers work on [ORIGINAL ROOMS]. Adding [NEW ROOMS] changes the scope, materials, and timeline. I'll need to requote before I can commit to the additional work. I can have the updated quote to you by [DATE]. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Creep.title: Extra Coaching Sessions Expected for Free (Coach)
Scope Creep.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, your package includes [NUMBER] sessions. I noticed you've been requesting additional time outside those sessions. I value our work together, but extra sessions need to be booked and paid for separately at [RATE]. I'm happy to add more to your plan if you'd like. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Creep.title: Requesting Social Media Management on a Web Project (Agency)
Scope Creep.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, social media management wasn't included in our website build agreement. That's a separate service with its own scope and pricing. I can provide a proposal for it if you're interested, but it won't be bundled into the current project cost. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Creep.title: Client Requesting Ongoing Support Post-Project (Consultant)
Scope Creep.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, the project deliverables have been completed as agreed. Ongoing advisory support is available through a separate retainer arrangement at [RATE/MONTH]. If you'd like to set that up, I can send the details. The current engagement is now complete. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Creep.title: Adding Video to a Photography Package (Videographer)
Scope Creep.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, your booking is for photography only. Video requires different equipment, editing time, and deliverables. I can add a video component starting at [AMOUNT], but I need to know before the shoot date so I can prepare accordingly. Let me know by [DATE]. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Scope Creep Escalation.title: Repeated Feature Requests After Scope Lock (Web Dev)
Client Keeps Adding Revision Rounds (Graphic Designer)
Client Expecting Free Training on Delivered System (Consultant)
Interior Design Client Adding Rooms After Contract (Interior Designer)
Personal Trainer Client Requesting Nutrition Plans (Trainer)
Client Requesting Raw Files Not in Agreement (Photographer)
Accountant Client Requesting Business Advisory (Accountant)
Agency Client Expanding Campaign Scope (Agency)

Retainer Boundaries.title: Hours Exceeded This Month (Agency)
Retainer Boundaries.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, you've used all [NUMBER] retainer hours for this month. Additional work is billed at [OVERAGE RATE] per hour. I can continue working if you authorize the overage, or we can pause non-essential tasks until your hours reset on [DATE]. Let me know your preference. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Retainer Boundaries.title: Retainer Does Not Include Emergency Calls (Consultant)
Retainer Boundaries.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I'm happy to help with urgent matters, but after-hours emergency calls are not included in your retainer. Your retainer covers [INCLUDED SERVICES] during [BUSINESS HOURS]. I offer an emergency response add-on at [RATE] per incident. Would you like me to add that to your plan? - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Retainer Boundaries.title: Unused Hours Don't Roll Over (Web Dev)
Retainer Boundaries.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand you'd like to carry last month's unused hours forward. As outlined in our retainer agreement, hours don't roll over between months. Your [NUMBER] hours for this month reset on [DATE]. I'd recommend prioritizing your most important tasks within the current allocation. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Retainer Boundaries.title: Retainer Is for Maintenance, Not New Builds (Web Dev)
Retainer Boundaries.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, the work you've described is a new build, not maintenance. Your retainer covers updates, bug fixes, and minor content changes. A new section or feature requires a separate project quote. I can send one through if you'd like to proceed, but it won't come out of your retainer hours. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Retainer Boundaries.title: Multiple Team Members Submitting Requests (Agency)
Retainer Boundaries.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've been receiving requests from several people on your team. To keep things organized and within your retainer hours, I need a single point of contact for task submissions. All requests should come through [DESIGNATED CONTACT] or be submitted via [METHOD]. This ensures nothing gets missed or double-handled. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Retainer Boundaries.title: Retainer Scope Doesn't Cover Third-Party Tools (Consultant)
Retainer Boundaries.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, your retainer covers [INCLUDED SERVICES]. Troubleshooting or managing third-party tools like [TOOL NAME] is outside that scope. I can help on an ad-hoc basis at [RATE/HOUR], or I'd recommend contacting [TOOL NAME] support directly for tool-specific issues. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Retainer Boundaries.title: Monthly Retainer Usage Report (Agency)
Retainer Boundaries.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, here's your retainer usage for this month: [HOURS USED] of [TOTAL HOURS] used. Remaining: [REMAINING HOURS]. Top tasks: [TASK SUMMARY]. Hours reset on [DATE]. If you'd like to increase your retainer to cover recurring overages, I can send updated pricing. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Retainer Boundaries.title: Retainer Cancellation Terms Reminder
Retainer Boundaries.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand you're considering pausing or cancelling your retainer. As per our agreement, cancellation requires [NOTICE PERIOD] written notice. Your current period runs until [END DATE]. If you'd like to downgrade instead, I can offer alternative packages. Let me know how you'd like to proceed. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Persistent Objections.title: Client Keeps Pushing After Price Was Confirmed
Persistent Objections.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand you'd like a lower price. The rate I quoted reflects the scope, quality, and timeframe involved. It's consistent with what I charge all clients at {{BUSINESS_NAME}}. The price is firm. If the budget doesn't work, I can suggest reducing the scope to bring the cost down. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Persistent Objections.title: Client Disputing a Policy Already Explained (Photographer)
Persistent Objections.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand this policy may not be what you expected. However, my position on [POLICY] was clearly outlined in the agreement you signed on [DATE]. I apply this consistently and I'm not able to make exceptions. I'm happy to answer any other questions, but the policy itself will not change. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Persistent Objections.title: Client Wanting to Revisit a Closed Decision (Contractor)
Persistent Objections.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, we discussed this on [DATE] and reached a decision. Reopening it at this stage would delay the project and potentially increase costs. I made the recommendation based on [REASON], and I stand by it. I need us to move forward with what was agreed. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Persistent Objections.title: Client Challenging Your Professional Recommendation (Accountant)
Persistent Objections.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I hear your concerns. My recommendation is based on [PROFESSIONAL REASONING/COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENT]. I wouldn't recommend something I didn't believe was in your best interest. If you'd like a second opinion, I encourage it. But I won't change my advice to something I can't professionally stand behind. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Persistent Objections.title: Client Disagreeing with Project Direction After Approval (Agency)
Persistent Objections.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, you approved this direction on [DATE] and work has progressed based on that approval. Changing direction now would mean [CONSEQUENCE - e.g., restarting from scratch, additional cost of $X, delay of X weeks]. If you'd like to pivot, I'll need a new brief and revised budget. Otherwise, I'll continue as approved. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Persistent Objections.title: Client Insisting on DIY Fix After Being Advised Against It (Plumber)
Persistent Objections.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've given you my professional assessment. Attempting that fix without the right tools and experience could lead to [CONSEQUENCE]. I'm not able to endorse or support a DIY approach on this. If you choose to go ahead on your own, that's your decision, but I want it on record that my recommendation was [RECOMMENDATION]. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Persistent Objections.title: Client Repeatedly Requesting a Refund After Delivery (Coach)
Persistent Objections.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand your position. As discussed, the sessions were delivered as agreed and the refund policy in our agreement does not cover completed sessions. I've addressed this request on [PREVIOUS DATE] and my position has not changed. I value you as a client, but I'm not able to revisit this further. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Persistent Objections.title: Client Wanting Guarantees You Cannot Provide (Consultant)
Persistent Objections.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand you'd like guaranteed results. I can guarantee the quality and thoroughness of my work, but I'm not able to guarantee specific outcomes that depend on factors outside my control. What I can promise is [WHAT YOU CAN GUARANTEE]. That's the professional standard I hold at {{BUSINESS_NAME}}, and I stand behind it fully. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Entitlement.title: Client Expecting Immediate Response at All Hours
Entitlement.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I received your messages overnight. My working hours at {{BUSINESS_NAME}} are [HOURS], and I respond to all messages within [TIMEFRAME] during those hours. I'm not available for immediate responses outside business hours. If you need faster turnaround, I offer a priority support add-on at [RATE]. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Entitlement.title: Client Demanding They Be Prioritized Over Others
Entitlement.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand your project feels urgent. I manage multiple clients at {{BUSINESS_NAME}} and give each one fair attention according to their agreed timeline. Your project is on track for [DEADLINE]. If you need priority scheduling, I can offer a rush fee arrangement, but I won't deprioritize other clients to accommodate. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Entitlement.title: Client Expecting Free Work Because of Past Spend
Entitlement.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I appreciate your loyalty to {{BUSINESS_NAME}} and the projects we've done together. Every project is scoped and priced individually. Previous spend doesn't create a credit toward future work. I'm happy to discuss a retainer arrangement if you'd like predictable ongoing support, but each engagement stands on its own. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Entitlement.title: Client Bypassing Process and Contacting You Directly (Agency)
Entitlement.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I appreciate you reaching out directly, but all project requests need to go through [PROCESS/CHANNEL]. This ensures nothing gets lost and your requests are actioned in order. I'm not able to accept tasks submitted outside our agreed workflow. Please resubmit through [CHANNEL] and I'll get to it promptly. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Entitlement.title: Client Requesting You Work Over a Holiday
Entitlement.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}} is closed on [HOLIDAY/DATES] and I won't be available for work during that period. I've planned the project timeline to account for this. If you need something before then, let me know by [DATE] and I'll make sure it's handled before I'm offline. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Entitlement.title: Client Comparing Your Rates to a Cheaper Provider
Entitlement.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I'm aware there are providers who charge less. My pricing at {{BUSINESS_NAME}} reflects my experience, the quality of deliverables, and the level of service I provide. I'm not in a position to match competitor rates, and I don't compete on price. If my services are the right fit, I'd love to work with you. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Entitlement.title: Client Expecting You to Manage Their Team (Consultant)
Entitlement.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, my role at {{BUSINESS_NAME}} is to provide [YOUR SERVICE]. Managing your internal team members, chasing them for deliverables, or mediating between departments is outside my scope. I can provide recommendations, but execution and people management sit with your team. Let me know if you'd like to refine our working arrangement. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Entitlement.title: Client Insisting on Unlimited Revisions
Entitlement.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I understand you want the final product to be right. Your package includes [NUMBER] rounds of revisions, which I've found is sufficient for most projects. Unlimited revisions aren't something I offer because they make it impossible to manage timelines and resources. If you'd like additional rounds, they're available at [RATE] per round. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Relationship Reset.title: Resetting Expectations After Informal Start
Relationship Reset.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've enjoyed working with you, and I want to make sure things run smoothly going forward. I'm moving all my client relationships at {{BUSINESS_NAME}} to a more structured process. From now on, all requests will need to be submitted in writing, and work will follow a signed scope and payment schedule. I'll send the updated terms this week. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Relationship Reset.title: Re-establishing Communication Boundaries
Relationship Reset.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I need to re-establish some communication boundaries. Going forward, please contact me during business hours only ([HOURS]) via {{BUSINESS_EMAIL}} or {{BUSINESS_PHONE}}. Personal social media, after-hours texts, and unscheduled calls are not part of our professional arrangement. I'll respond to all messages received during business hours within [TIMEFRAME]. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Relationship Reset.title: Moving from Friend Pricing to Standard Rates
Relationship Reset.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, when we started working together, I offered discounted rates. As {{BUSINESS_NAME}} has grown, I've standardized my pricing for all clients. Effective [DATE], your rate will move to [NEW RATE]. This reflects the full value of the service and ensures I can continue to deliver quality work. I appreciate your understanding. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}

Relationship Reset.title: Formalizing a Verbal Agreement
Relationship Reset.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I realize we've been working off verbal agreements up to this point. To protect both of us, I'd like to put a formal agreement in place. I've drafted one that reflects our current arrangement: [SCOPE SUMMARY]. Please review, sign, and return it by [DATE]. All future work will follow this process. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Relationship Reset.title: Declining to Continue Under Current Terms
Relationship Reset.body: {{CLIENT_NAME}}, I've valued our working relationship. After reviewing how things have been going, I've decided I can only continue under updated terms. The new terms include [KEY CHANGES]. I'll send the revised agreement this week. If these terms don't work for you, I understand, and I'll ensure a smooth transition to another provider. - {{YOUR_FIRST_NAME}}, {{BUSINESS_NAME}}

Pricing Pushback.title: Client Asking for a Bulk Discount (Photographer)
Client Saying "My Last Provider Was Cheaper" (Web Dev)
Client Offering "Exposure" Instead of Payment (Graphic Designer)
Client Requesting Payment After Delivery (Contractor)
Client Asking to "Just Do This One Thing for Free" (Personal Trainer)
